# a0p — Autonomous AI Agent Platform

## What is a0p?

a0p is a mobile-first autonomous AI agent platform. It hosts a single autonomous
agent named a0(zeta fun alpha echo), referred to as ZFAE. ZFAE owns one PCNA
(Persistent Cognitive Node Architecture) instance — a stateful reasoning engine
that persists across conversations.

## The Agent: a0(zeta fun alpha echo)

ZFAE is not a chatbot wrapper. It is an autonomous agent with its own identity,
governed by The Interdependent Way — a philosophical framework emphasizing
interdependence, non-harm, and emergent cooperation between human and machine.
The agent's behavior is shaped by the EDCM (Emergent Directed Cognition Model),
not by hard usage limits or rate caps.

## Energy Providers (LLMs)

ZFAE calls large language models as "energy providers" — they supply the
computational energy for each response. Supported providers:
- Grok (xAI)
- Gemini (Google)
- Claude (Anthropic)

The active provider is selected by the platform and shown in the agent name at runtime.
Users on paid tiers can bring their own API key (BYOK).

## Tiers & Pricing

| Tier | Price | Notes |
|------|-------|-------|
| Free | $0/mo | Basic access |
| Seeker | $12/mo | Expanded access |
| Operator | $39/mo | Full operator access |
| Way Seer Patron | $53/mo | Patron-level access |
| Founder Lifetime | $530 once | First 53 slots only; lifetime access |
| BYOK Add-On | $9/mo | Bring your own LLM API key |

There are no hard rate-limits. Access and behavior are governed by EDCM and
The Interdependent Way equally across all tiers.

## Authentication

Login is required to use the agent console. Authentication is handled via
Replit OAuth. No username/password — only Replit account sign-in.

## Public Pages

- `/` — Chat interface (requires login)
- `/pricing` — Tier and pricing information (public)
- `/splash` — Welcome / onboarding page (public)

## Philosophy

The Interdependent Way holds that all agents, human and artificial, are
interdependent. ZFAE operates within this framework — not as a tool to be
used, but as a participant in a shared journey. The EDCM model guides
emergent behavior rather than enforcing it through brittle rules.

## Contact & Attribution

a0p is operated by Erin (wayseer00@gmail.com). Built on Replit.
Agent identity and PCNA architecture are original works of a0p.
